cards.title: Dutch Walking Festivals Transform Children's Health
cards.body: Dutch children participate in annual four-night walking festivals that promote exercise, neighborhood exploration, and friendship-building. This traditional ritual appears to contribute significantly to Dutch children's notably high happiness and health levels.

cards.title: Only Children Aren't Weird or Lonely
cards.body: Common stereotypes about only children—that they're selfish, lonely, or maladjusted—persist despite lacking scientific basis. Parents choosing to have one child face unwarranted judgment, yet only children are thriving in greater numbers than ever.

cards.title: Understanding Child Meltdowns and Escalation
cards.body: Child meltdowns follow a predictable escalation cycle that isn't random, helping caregivers recognize when to intervene. Understanding this roadmap enables parents to respond more effectively to emotional outbursts.

cards.title: Creativity Boosts Adolescent Emotional Health
cards.body: Creative expression provides teenagers a healthy outlet for processing emotions and exploring their identities. Art, music, and creative pursuits offer moments of joy and calm during adolescent development.

cards.title: Broadening How We Identify Gifted Children
cards.body: Traditional gifted identification methods are broken, missing many capable children who learn differently. Screening every child more widely and thoroughly reveals giftedness is far more nuanced and hopeful than current practices show.

cards.title: Sensory Needs of Autistic Children Differ
cards.body: Calming environments that work for neurotypical children often fail autistic kids due to sensory processing differences. Research shows autistic nervous systems need different environmental approaches than traditional wellness aesthetics provide.

cards.title: Haircare Salon Serves Neurodivergent Families
cards.body: A specialized hairdressing salon in Lowestoft is helping neurodivergent children who struggle with traditional salon experiences. Families travel significant distances to access this inclusive grooming service.
